title: Entity Schema Mapping
description: Detailed column-level mapping from source SQL staging tables to Dataverse entity attributes

boulders.name: Entity List
boulders.description: Identify all entities to map by cross-referencing staging tables with Dataverse schema

stack.instruction: Extract all entities with alm_ prefix: {logicalName, entitySetName, attributes (as array)}

criteria.description: Summary table linking DV entities to their staging tables and transform SPs
Every staging table with 'alm' in the name is matched to a DV entity, or marked as 'orphan' with explanation
